rag_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component type or implementation scopes
Use implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Ground all AGREE variables in the current AADL model or explicit declarations
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes for input/output contracts
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are grounded in the model
Avoid using AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions without proper declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Wrap AGREE contracts in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use visible identifiers and avoid unresolved references
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation annexes for input/output contracts
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts without proper representation
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit declarations
